languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."

languages.text: "Госпожа Хейдари, я польщен вашей безграничной щедростью, но хочу отметить, что слово "пожертвование" предполагает безвозмездное дарение. Впрочем, я уверен, что мы сможем найти компромисс".
"Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."
languages.original_text: "Госпожа Хейдари, я польщен вашей безграничной щедростью, но хочу отметить, что слово "пожертвование" предполагает безвозмездное дарение. Впрочем, я уверен, что мы сможем найти компромисс".

traits.locale_text: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."
"Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."
"Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."

languages.text: «Señora Heydari, me halaga su infinita generosidad, pero me veo obligado a señalar que "donar" implica un regalo entregado libre de cargos. Sin embargo, no me cabe duda de que llegaremos a un consenso».
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."

traits.locale_text: «Señora Heydari, me halaga su infinita generosidad, pero me veo obligado a señalar que "donar" implica un regalo entregado libre de cargos. Sin embargo, no me cabe duda de que llegaremos a un consenso».

languages.text: 「ヘイダリ女史、あなたの限りない気前のよさには恐縮しますが、一点申し上げれば、『譲る』という言葉は無償で与える贈り物を意味します。とはいえ、我々はきっと合意点を見出せるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."

traits.locale_text: 「ヘイダリ女史、あなたの限りない気前のよさには恐縮しますが、一点申し上げれば、『譲る』という言葉は無償で与える贈り物を意味します。とはいえ、我々はきっと合意点を見出せるでしょう」

languages.text: “海达利女士，你的慷慨无私令我受宠若惊，但我想指出，‘捐赠’一词意味着免费给予。不过，我相信我们能够达成共识。”
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."

traits.locale_text: “海达利女士，你的慷慨无私令我受宠若惊，但我想指出，‘捐赠’一词意味着免费给予。不过，我相信我们能够达成共识。”

languages.text: "Meisterin Heydari, Eure grenzenlose Großzügigkeit schmeichelt mir, aber ich muss Euch daran erinnern, dass der Begriff 'schenken' keine Bezahlung vorsieht. Aber ich bin sicher, wir finden einen Konsens."
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."

traits.locale_text: "Meisterin Heydari, Eure grenzenlose Großzügigkeit schmeichelt mir, aber ich muss Euch daran erinnern, dass der Begriff 'schenken' keine Bezahlung vorsieht. Aber ich bin sicher, wir finden einen Konsens."

languages.text: « Maîtresse Heydari, votre générosité sans bornes me flatte, mais j'aimerais vous préciser que le mot "don" implique que vous me cédiez ces articles gratuitement. Cependant, je suis certain que nous pouvons parvenir à un accord. »
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."

traits.locale_text: « Maîtresse Heydari, votre générosité sans bornes me flatte, mais j'aimerais vous préciser que le mot "don" implique que vous me cédiez ces articles gratuitement. Cependant, je suis certain que nous pouvons parvenir à un accord. »

languages.text: "Üstat Heydari, sonsuz cömertliğiniz beni gururlandırdı ama 'bağışlamak' kelimesinin ücretsiz verilen bir hediyeyi ima ettiğini belirtmek isterim. Yine de bir uzlaşma yolu bulabileceğimize eminim."
languages.original_text: "Mistress Heydari, I am flattered by your boundless generosity, but I would like to point out that the word 'donate' implies a gift given free of charge. However, I am sure we can find a consensus."

traits.locale_text: "Üstat Heydari, sonsuz cömertliğiniz beni gururlandırdı ama 'bağışlamak' kelimesinin ücretsiz verilen bir hediyeyi ima ettiğini belirtmek isterim. Yine de bir uzlaşma yolu bulabileceğimize eminim."
